HGSS.626.0000:
Um...
Who did you say I was again?\f
...
...\f
Oh, yes, I remember now!
I’m the Move Deleter!\f
HGSS.626.0001:
You’ve come to make me force your
Pokémon to forget some moves? [0200,0000]
HGSS.626.0002: Which Pokémon should forget a move?\f
HGSS.626.0003:
Remember me if there are moves that
need to be forgotten.
HGSS.626.0004:
That Pokémon knows only one move,
so it can’t be forgotten...\f
HGSS.626.0005:
What? That’s an Egg.
No Egg should know any moves.\f
HGSS.626.0006:
OK, then.
Which move should be forgotten?\f
HGSS.626.0007:
Hm! The move [0106,0000,0000]?
Should that move be forgotten? [0200,0000]
HGSS.626.0008:
It worked perfectly!\f
Your Pokémon has forgotten the move
[0106,0000,0000] completely.
HGSS.626.0009:
Me?
I’m the Pokémon Move Maniac.\f
I know every move that Pokémon learn
while they’re leveling up, and I can\r
make Pokémon remember those moves.\f
I can make a Pokémon of yours remember
a move if you’d like.\f
But...ahem! It’ll cost you.\f
I’ll make a Pokémon remember a move
if you’ll trade me a Heart Scale.
HGSS.626.0010:
Ha! That’s it! That’s an honest-to-
goodness Heart Scale!\f
Let me guess, you want me to teach
one of your Pokémon a move?\f
HGSS.626.0011:
If any of your Pokémon needs to learn a
move, come back with a Heart Scale.
HGSS.626.0013: Which move should I make it remember?\f
HGSS.626.0014:
Sorry...\f
There isn’t any move I can make
that Pokémon remember.
HGSS.626.0015:
Hunh?\f
Don’t you think it’d be tough for
an Egg to remember a move?\f
It’s not even hatched.
HGSS.626.0025:
[0103,0003,0000] handed over one
Heart Scale in exchange.
HGSS.626.0026:
Hohoho...
They call me Grandma Wilma.\f
I sense a slight talent as a
Dragon Tamer in you.\f
Would you like me to teach a move
to one of your Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.626.0027:
Ah, it is you again...\f
Would you like me to teach the best
Dragon-type move I know to one of\r
your Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.626.0028:
Well, perhaps if you change your
mind, do come back.
HGSS.626.0029:
I see...
I like your sense of adventure.\f
However, none of the Pokémon with
you now can learn the move.
HGSS.626.0030:
Fine, fine, now pick the Pokémon
I should teach the move to.\f
HGSS.626.0031:
Sorry to disappoint you...\f
That Pokémon you have can learn this
move, but it hasn’t come to trust\r
you fully yet...\f
Until then, I can’t make it learn
this move.
HGSS.626.0032:
Sorry to disappoint you...
That Pokémon can’t learn this move.
HGSS.626.0033:
Hmm...\f
Teaching a move to an Egg is
a challenge that’s beyond me.
HGSS.626.0042:
Draco Meteor’s destructive power
is awe inspiring.\f
However, using it will also lower
the user’s Special Attack.
HGSS.626.0043:
Your quest for power has brought
you here...\f
Very well.\f
Let me reward your passion with some
absolutely astounding moves.\f
They’re the ultimate moves!\f
Shall I teach them to
your Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.626.0044:
The ultimate moves!\f
Shall I teach them to
your Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.626.0045:
To which Pokémon should I teach
a move?\f
HGSS.626.0046:
Hmm... Well, that is fine, as well.
Visit if you have a change of heart.
HGSS.626.0048:
That Pokémon can’t learn a move!
Read the memo there! Keh!
HGSS.626.0049:
Teach a move to an Egg?
Impossible even for me! Keh!
HGSS.626.0050:
You’ve not bonded strongly enough
with your Pokémon! Keh!
HGSS.626.0051:
That Pokémon already knows the move
I’ve offered to teach! Keh!
HGSS.626.0052:
I should teach Blast Burn to
your [0100,0000,0000]? [0200,0000]
HGSS.626.0053:
I should teach Hydro Cannon to
your [0100,0000,0000]? [0200,0000]
HGSS.626.0054:
I should teach Frenzy Plant to
your [0100,0000,0000]? [0200,0000]
HGSS.626.0061:
To the Pokémon listed here,
the ultimate moves may be taught!\f
The blazing Fire-type Pokémon
[0203,0007]CHARIZARD TYPHLOSION\r
[0203,0007]BLAZIKEN INFERNAPE\f
The restless Water-type Pokémon
[0203,0007]BLASTOISE FERALIGATR\r
[0203,0007]SWAMPERT EMPOLEON\f
The quiet Grass-type Pokémon
[0203,0007]VENUSAUR MEGANIUM\r
[0203,0007]SCEPTILE TORTERRA
HGSS.626.0062:
Well then, I will teach [0100,0000,0000]
a move...\f
